attributes.action: Put The British Bulldog Davey Boy Smith on our bank notes
attributes.background: Recognize one of the true sporting heroes of our country and put an image of The British Bulldog Davey Boy Smith on our bank notes.

rejection.details:
Banknotes are the responsibility of the Bank of England, which is independent of the Government and Parliament.

You can find out how the Bank decides who/what will be on banknotes here:
https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/banknotes/banknote-characters
